wine_bars_late.name: Le Cercle des Aromes
wine_bars_late.wine_program: A central Colmar wine bar listed on the official Alsace Wine Route's wine-bars page, pouring grower Alsace by the glass alongside small plates
wine_bars_late.tip: Listed on the Alsace Wine Route's curated bar selection; ask for a Riesling Grand Cru flight to compare different climats in a single sitting.
wine_bars_late.description: A central Colmar wine bar on the Alsace Wine Route's curated list, pouring grower Riesling and Pinot Gris by the glass with small plates.

wine_bars_late.name: Alsace Wine Route curated wine-bar circuit
wine_bars_late.wine_program: The Alsace Wine Route's official curated wine-bar list, covering Colmar, Strasbourg, Obernai, Saverne, Mulhouse and Vieux-Ferrette with a Vignoble et Decouvertes label
wine_bars_late.tip: Use the Alsace Wine Route wine-bar page to plan a city wine-bar circuit; the bars in Strasbourg and Colmar stay open later than the village ones.
wine_bars_late.description: The Alsace Wine Route's official wine-bar selection, the deepest curated list of grower-led bars across the region from Saverne to Mulhouse.

fortified_specialists.name: Distillerie Massenez (Eau-de-vie de fruits)
fortified_specialists.wine_program: A historic Alsatian eau-de-vie distillery with tasting flights of kirsch, mirabelle, framboise, poire Williams and rarer fruit spirits, the Alsatian after-dinner pour
fortified_specialists.tip: Eau-de-vie is the digestif of Alsace; ask for a flight of kirsch, framboise and mirabelle to see the family's flagship fruit distillations.
fortified_specialists.description: A historic Alsatian fruit-spirit distillery with tasting flights of kirsch, mirabelle and framboise eaux-de-vie, the Alsatian after-dinner pour.

fortified_specialists.name: Distillerie G.E. Massenez and Miclo, Lapoutroie
fortified_specialists.wine_program: A long-running Lapoutroie eau-de-vie distillery, with kirsch from local cherry orchards alongside whisky and gin in the modern range
fortified_specialists.tip: Lapoutroie is the historic centre of Alsatian eau-de-vie; pair a Miclo visit with the village's farmhouse-cheese makers for a non-wine half-day.
fortified_specialists.description: A Lapoutroie eau-de-vie distillery, the historic heart of Alsatian fruit-spirit production, with kirsch, mirabelle, framboise and modern whisky alongside.

fortified_specialists.name: Lucien Albrecht (Marc d'Alsace)
fortified_specialists.wine_program: An Orschwihr house known for Cremant and pomace-distilled Marc d'Alsace de Gewurztraminer, a regional grape-pomace eau-de-vie
fortified_specialists.tip: Marc d'Alsace de Gewurztraminer is the region's signature pomace spirit; ask to taste it beside the dry Cremant for the two faces of the same fruit.
fortified_specialists.description: An Orschwihr house with Cremant alongside Marc d'Alsace de Gewurztraminer, the region's distinctive pomace eau-de-vie distilled from Gewurztraminer skins.

late_tastings.name: Cave Historique des Hospices de Strasbourg evening tastings
late_tastings.wine_program: The 1395 cellar of the Hospices de Strasbourg, hosting tastings of more than 30 Alsatian estates' wines under the Hospices label, with the 1472 cask on display
late_tastings.tip: Closed Sundays; the 1472 cask is the centrepiece of the cellar, and the bottling collection covers major Alsace estates.
late_tastings.description: The 1395 hospital cellar of Strasbourg, home of the 1472 cask and a 30-estate Hospices bottling collection, the city's signature historic tasting.

late_tastings.name: CIVA Maison des Vins d'Alsace, Colmar
late_tastings.address: 12 Avenue de la Foire aux Vins, 68000 Colmar, France
late_tastings.wine_program: The interprofessional CIVA building in Colmar hosts year-round tastings of Alsatian appellations across the wine route, useful for a one-stop introductory flight
late_tastings.tip: The CIVA's tasting bar in Colmar pours appellation flights from across Alsace, a useful one-stop sampler before driving the wine route.
late_tastings.description: The CIVA's interprofessional house in Colmar, where tasting flights cover the full Alsace appellation hierarchy in one room.

late_tastings.name: Alsace Wine Route grower-cellar evening tastings
late_tastings.wine_program: The Alsace Wine Route's calendar lists hundreds of grower-led evening events through the season, from Parenthese Vigneronne tastings to cellar workshops
late_tastings.tip: Use the wineroute.alsace events calendar to find evening tastings by date and village; the Parenthese Vigneronne label marks deeper, more curated grower visits.
late_tastings.description: The Alsace Wine Route's events calendar curates grower-led evening tastings across the wine villages, from cellar visits to Parenthese Vigneronne deep dives.

sparkling_rooms.name: Wolfberger Cremant cellar, Eguisheim
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Wolfberger is a major Cremant d'Alsace producer, with a dedicated tasting room at Eguisheim pouring its full traditional-method sparkling range
sparkling_rooms.tip: Wolfberger's Cremant tasting flight covers a single house's full range from blanc de blancs to blanc de noirs in one sitting.
sparkling_rooms.description: The Wolfberger cooperative's Eguisheim cellar, pouring its full Cremant d'Alsace range from entry-level Brut through to vintage cuvees.

sparkling_rooms.name: Bestheim Cremant cellar, Bennwihr
sparkling_rooms.address: 3 Rue du General de Gaulle, 68630 Bennwihr, France
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Bestheim is a major Cremant d'Alsace house and its Bennwihr cellar runs scheduled tastings of the Prestige and vintage Cremant lineup
sparkling_rooms.tip: Bestheim's Prestige Cremant is a strong value within the AOC; taste the vintage cuvee alongside it to see what extra lees ageing does to the wine.
sparkling_rooms.description: Bestheim's Bennwihr cellar, a major Cremant d'Alsace house, with tasting flights of Prestige and vintage traditional-method sparkling.

sparkling_rooms.name: Lucien Albrecht Cremant cellar, Orschwihr
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Lucien Albrecht in Orschwihr is a historic Cremant d'Alsace house tied to the AOC's 1976 founding, with cellar tastings of Brut, Brut Rose and Pinot Gris cuvees
sparkling_rooms.tip: Lucien Albrecht was active in the 1976 founding of the Cremant d'Alsace AOC; the cellar visit puts the regional sparkling story in context.
sparkling_rooms.description: The Orschwihr cellar of Lucien Albrecht, a historic Cremant d'Alsace house tied to the 1976 founding of the AOC, with tasting flights from Brut to Brut Rose and Pinot Gris cuvees.
